channel.title: Education on GOWRA PAVAN
channel.description: Recent content in Education on GOWRA PAVAN

item.title: Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School
item.description: About Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School, Guntur Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School, also known as Dr. KLP Public School, was established in 1983. It is managed by the Nagarjuna Education Society and is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE). School Information Year of Establishment 1983 School Area 12,485 Sq. Metres Parent Institution Nagarjuna Education Society Academics The Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) and offers a diverse range of streams including PCM, PCB, and Arts.

item.title: NARAYANA JUNIOUR COLLEGE
item.description: About NARAYANA JR. COLLEGE BRUNDAVAN GARDEN GUNTUR Established in 2012 and managed by Pvt. Unaided, NARAYANA JR. COLLEGE BRUNDAVAN GARDEN GUNTUR is situated in an Urban area within the GUNTUR block of GUNTUR district, ANDHRA PRADESH. The college offers Grades 11 to 12 and operates as a Co-educational institution without a pre-primary section. Instruction is provided in English, and the academic session commences in April. The college boasts N/A building infrastructure, comprising 0 classrooms in good condition.
